modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: VPN and Internet connectivity issues at the building

full_description_text:
- The user reported that the VPN and Internet is not working at their building.  
- They mentioned that they are unable to connect to the network.  
- This issue is affecting their ability to work effectively.
short_description: VPN and Internet connectivity issues at the building
description:
